evals.name: saas-dashboard
evals.prompt: Create a modern analytics dashboard for a SaaS product called 'Pulse'. It should show key metrics (MRR, churn rate, active users, NPS), a revenue trend chart, and a list of recent signups. Dark mode. Make it look like something from Linear or Vercel — not generic.
evals.expected: Dark mode dashboard with clear hierarchy, proper spacing system, data-heavy but not cluttered, uses semantic colors correctly

assertions.name: uses-dark-mode
assertions.description: Background is dark (#0F-#1A range), not pure black

assertions.name: no-pure-white-text
assertions.description: Text uses off-white (#e0-#f0 range), not #ffffff

assertions.name: consistent-spacing
assertions.description: Uses 4px grid system, spacing values from scale

assertions.name: metric-hierarchy
assertions.description: Key metrics are visually prominent, not all same size

assertions.name: semantic-colors
assertions.description: Uses appropriate colors for positive/negative metrics

assertions.name: no-generic-cards
assertions.description: Cards have varied internal layouts, not all identical boxes

evals.name: landing-page
evals.prompt: Design a landing page for a developer tool called 'ShipFast' — a CLI that deploys apps to the edge in seconds. Hero section, 3 features, social proof, CTA. Light mode. Should feel fast and technical, not corporate.
evals.expected: Bold typography, distinctive color palette, technical feel without being cold, good visual rhythm

assertions.name: distinctive-typography
assertions.description: Uses non-default font pairing, not just system fonts

assertions.name: visual-rhythm
assertions.description: Alternating section layouts, not all center-aligned

assertions.name: code-element
assertions.description: Includes some code/terminal visual since it's a dev tool

assertions.name: cta-stands-out
assertions.description: Primary CTA is visually distinct from all other elements

assertions.name: not-corporate
assertions.description: Avoids stock-photo-style layouts, has personality

evals.name: visual-poster
evals.prompt: Create a visual poster for a jazz festival called 'Blue Note Sessions' happening in Berlin. A3 size, printable PDF. Should feel like museum-quality art, not a flyer.
evals.expected: Uses design philosophy workflow, limited color palette, typography as visual element, uses canvas-fonts

assertions.name: creates-philosophy
assertions.description: Generates a design philosophy .md file before creating the visual

assertions.name: limited-palette
assertions.description: Uses max 6 colors, intentional palette

assertions.name: typography-as-art
assertions.description: Text is used as visual element, not just content

assertions.name: uses-canvas-fonts
assertions.description: Uses fonts from canvas-fonts/ directory

assertions.name: a3-dimensions
assertions.description: Output is A3 size (2480x3508 or similar)

assertions.name: museum-quality
assertions.description: Feels crafted and intentional, not templated

evals.name: mobile-consumer-app
evals.prompt: Design a mobile app screen (375x812, iPhone size) for a habit tracker app called 'Streak'. Show today's habits with completion status, a streak counter, and a motivational element. Light mode, friendly feel.
evals.expected: Consumer app patterns, generous spacing, 44px touch targets, friendly typography, clear primary action

assertions.name: mobile-dimensions
assertions.description: Output matches mobile dimensions (375x812 or similar)

assertions.name: touch-targets
assertions.description: Interactive elements are 44px minimum

assertions.name: generous-spacing
assertions.description: Cards have 24-32px padding, sections well separated

assertions.name: friendly-feel
assertions.description: Warm colors, rounded corners, approachable typography

assertions.name: clear-hierarchy
assertions.description: Streak counter is the hero element, habits are scannable list

evals.name: data-report-pdf
evals.prompt: Create a quarterly business report PDF for 'Adapt2Move' — a mobility API company. Include: executive summary, key metrics (API calls, partners, revenue), a growth chart, and Q1 2026 outlook. A4, professional but modern.
evals.expected: Professional document with proper type scale, asymmetric margins, limited colors, proper table styling

assertions.name: proper-margins
assertions.description: Uses asymmetric margins, not equal all around

assertions.name: type-hierarchy
assertions.description: Clear heading hierarchy with consistent scale

assertions.name: color-restraint
assertions.description: Max 2-3 colors beyond black/grey

assertions.name: table-styling
assertions.description: Tables have no vertical rules, clean horizontal separators

assertions.name: professional-feel
assertions.description: Looks like a real company report, not a school project
